case_for: Adams has cleared 12 points in 4 of his last 6 games, including his two most recent outings (17.6 and 25.9), and carries a strong 25.9-point consensus projection into this matchup.
case_against: He has shown real floor risk with two sub-10-point games this season (9.4 and 9.1), showing week-to-week volatility that could resurface.
